name: Audit and Correct GHS Hazard Classifications for All Chemicals
description: The Green Valley Water Facility (Colchester, VT) has received a compliance notice from the Vermont Department of Environmental Conservation indicating that its Tier II chemical hazard classifications are incomplete and do not reflect the full GHS hazard profiles of the stored chemicals. As the new Environmental Health & Safety Manager, you must audit every chemical in the facility's inventory and correct all hazard classifications to match the actual chemical properties per standard Safety Data Sheet (SDS) information. The EPA Tier2 Submit application is already open. Import the facility's data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\green_valley_baseline.t2s, then review and correct the hazard classifications for ALL chemicals. The corrections must be based on standard chemical safety data for each substance (identified by CAS number). After correcting all hazards, save and export the corrected submission to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\corrected_hazards.t2s.

keep_hazards: Serious eye damage or eye irritation

add_hazards: Serious eye damage or eye irritation
